subcodes.first_line: The celestial nightingale, winging its flight from the divine rose-garden, hath turned toward this mortal world and for a few days upon the branches of time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عندلیب قدسی از گلزار الهی قصد جهان فانی نمود و روزی چند بر شاخسار روزگار
subcodes.subjects: @Baha'u'llah in Sulaymaniyyih, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
